use_cases: Displaying key metrics and statistics on analytics dashboards
Showing KPIs and performance indicators in financial dashboards
Presenting numerical data in SaaS product metrics views
Highlighting engagement statistics in media and content platforms
Providing real-time monitoring data in monitoring and observability tools
ai_summary: A dark-themed stat card component featuring glass-morphism styling with backdrop blur, gradient text effects, and continuous ambient animations including a moving halo, rotating ray, and pulsing text glow. Designed for displaying key metrics and statistics on dashboards and data visualization interfaces, particularly popular in SaaS analytics, fintech dashboards, and business intelligence tools.
